description: A stylish, fashionable choice from Inc. 5. With it's sleek simple design and eye-catching embellishments, this pair is perfect for evening and party wear.  The thong styled shape will perfectly complement ethnic or Western outfits.This pair comes with a shoe bag that helps you pack easily when you travel.UpperLeather-look footbed with cord detail around edgeSequinned straps from midfoot to toe to hold foot in placeHas a toe separator to comfortably hold the foot in placeOutsoleDurable outsole with slight heelWaved grooves on midfoot, texturing on toe and grooves on heel for great gripSandal careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
